description: 課程模組組裝（Content / Interaction / Review 三層設計與 contract 對齊）

tasks.desc: Define the canonical three-layer model: Content module, Interaction module, Review module, and their responsibilities, treating dialogue/video as peer input carriers.
Map existing node taxonomy to the three-layer model: learning_role/content_form/output_mode to modular responsibilities, including the boundary between knowledge payload and support surface.

Introduce interaction_modes contract proposal for multi-answer-path nodes, covering response_builder, guided_typing, and guided_speaking answer paths with default_interaction_mode and precedence rules.
Introduce review_policy contract proposal for Anki-style review cards, scheduling semantics, card source definitions, and review cue priority.
Introduce completion_rules contract proposal (required_modes, min_attempts, pass_policy) for guided output consistency.
Resolve contract mismatches between UNITFAC specs/templates/checker (repair_practice, followup semantics, command paths, source_refs naming, sections versus teaching_blocks wording).
Authoring template integration: add content/interaction/review sections and examples in UNITFAC-005 templates.
Checker integration: warning-first rules for missing interaction_modes/review_policy/completion_rules metadata.
Pilot application on A1-U05: attach modular metadata and validate mockup behavior with existing renderer registry, including dialogue/video carriers and transitional grammar_note.sections support.
Freeze recommendation: define what enters UNITFAC-001 v0.1 contract vs what remains optional, with frozen carrier/structure boundaries and deferred migration details.

Add course content segmentation and inline anchor linking: sentence/chunk click targets should open dictionary or knowledge lab refs when canonical knowledge links exist (e.g. weekday -> topic.weekday, numbers -> topic.number, endings -> grammar refs).

Define canonical pattern_frame + slot_bank contract for controlled substitution drills such as sentence assembly, slot replacement, and fill-in exercises; must align with frozen EXAMPLE_SENTENCE_BANK_SCHEMA_V1 (not just V0 draft).

Define sentence practice action contract for content-first runtime so listen, repeat, shadow, type, and linked-knowledge drill-down work across dialogue, video transcript, article sentence, and future custom text.
